request_payload.exposure_text: As a former defense policy advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our national security. It's not just about being self-reliant—it's about ensuring our allies can count on us while protecting our civil liberties. The data shows that countries with strong strategic autonomy frameworks experience fewer security breaches and better public preparedness. Let's not compromise on this crucial issue. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
